revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 1024x512 px high-resolution 16-bit-style pixel-art animated sprite sheet on a perfectly solid #FF00FF chroma-key background. No gradients in the background. Sheet layout is exactly 4 columns x 2 rows, 8 equal frames, each frame 256x256 px. Do not draw grid lines, borders, frame numbers, labels, text, logos, or watermarks. Empty space in every cell must be pure #FF00FF.

Use the attached reference image as the strict identity reference for the hero Mito. Treat this as re-posing the same approved character, not designing a new one. Match the reference character's proportions, head-to-body ratio, body width, palette, outline style, pixel density, slim-but-sturdy balance, total height, and readable pixel-cluster style exactly. Keep identity and scale consistent across all 8 frames.

Character: Mito, an androgynous 15-year-old mythical-Japan action RPG wanderer, bright cheerful palette, top-down 3/4 game sprite but facing LEFT in a clean side profile. Ink-black short hair tied into a tiny low ponytail at the nape, vermilion braided-cord hair ornament, calm amber eyes. White tube-sleeved top, short indigo-blue haori jacket with small vermilion braided-cord knots on sleeves and hem, loose young-leaf-green hakama trousers tucked into dark leggings with red cord ties, light travel sandals, vermilion braided cord belt-sash with small tassel, necklace with three pale-green magatama beads. At his left hip is a sheathed short ritual sword in a WHITE scabbard wrapped with a thin sacred rope and tiny white paper streamers; it must read as a festival ritual implement, not a samurai katana. No samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho.

CRITICAL PROPORTION LOCK: every frame depicts the exact same character at the exact same scale. Head size, head-to-body ratio, body width, limb thickness, total height, and body volume must remain identical across frames. The side view must keep exactly the same head size, total height, and body volume as the reference front-view walking sheet. Do not make the character wider, stockier, taller, shorter, or restyled.

STANCE LOCK: standing relaxed and natural in left-facing side profile. Front and back foot are a clear comfortable step apart with visible gap between feet. Legs nearly vertical, weight settled. The feet never move between frames. Feet stay on the same ground line in every cell. Head stays at almost the same height in every cell except the stated 1px breathing offsets. Center each character inside its own 256x256 cell with clear solid chroma-key margin on all four sides.

SWORD LOCK: the white scabbard faces the viewer and stays sheathed on the hip in exactly the same position, angle, and length in every frame. Never in hand. Do not let any sword piece move, detach, cross a cell border, or vary frame to frame.

Motion: quiet 8-frame subtle BREATHING IDLE loop for ONE direction only, facing LEFT. Arrange frames as TOP row frames 1-4 left to right, BOTTOM row frames 5-8 left to right.
Frame 1: neutral relaxed stance.
Frame 2: slow inhale, chest and shoulders rise 1-2 px, feet unchanged.
Frame 3: inhale peak, head lifts 1 px, shoulders subtly highest, feet unchanged.
Frame 4: breath held, same body position as peak, cord tassels and haori hem drift very subtly.
Frame 5: exhale begins, shoulders settle slightly, feet unchanged.
Frame 6: lowest relaxed point, body 1-2 px lower than neutral, feet unchanged.
Frame 7: calm blink, eyes closed, body returning toward neutral, feet unchanged.
Frame 8: eyes open, exactly back to neutral stance for seamless loop.

The silhouette change must be small, smooth, and idle-like, not action. Haori hem, tassel, and white paper streamers sway only very subtly. Each frame must be crisp low-resolution pixel art with no antialiasing blur, consistent palette, dark one-pixel outline where useful, and top-left light source.

STRICT CLEANLINESS: exactly one character per cell. Every drawn shape belongs to the character inside its own cell. No detached fragments, isolated pixel islands, seam slivers, dust specks, leftover effect residue, grid artifacts, or loose particles anywhere. No bird, no companion creature, no modern objects, no gun, no horror mood, no dark gloomy palette, no letter emblems, no UI.

Avoid likenesses or logos from Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, or Sakuna. Create an original character matching only the attached reference identity and the prompt above.
